headline: USPS American Icons Commemorative Stamp Collection Curated by Ralph Lauren Marks America's 250th Anniversary
summary: The U.S. Postal Service today honored the nation's 250th anniversary with American Icons, a collection of 13 commemorative stamps curated by legendary American designer Ralph Lauren.
